negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: industry_015
prompt: A high-definition video showcasing a conveyor belt system within an industrial food processing facility. The scene focuses on a row of ripe, orange tomatoes moving steadily along the metallic conveyor belt. The tomatoes have green stems attached and appear fresh and uniform in size. The conveyor belt is flanked by black knobs at regular intervals, and the background is slightly blurred, emphasizing the movement of the tomatoes. The lighting is bright, highlighting the vibrant color of the tomatoes. As the video progresses, the tomatoes continue to move forward at a steady pace, with no significant changes in their position or appearance. The conveyor belt operates smoothly, pausing at regular intervals, but no new objects or actions are introduced into the scene. The overall state of the scene remains consistent, with the conveyor belt continuing its operation. A medium shot captures the continuous motion of the tomatoes on the conveyor belt.
